forbidden_headline: A full four-coordinate black-hole HRSM space has been established.
replacement: A reduced black-hole projection is operational in the tested simulation and survey branches.

forbidden_headline: Specific accretion rate has been validated as adaptive reserve.
replacement: Specific accretion rate is used provisionally as a forcing or throughput coordinate.

forbidden_headline: Every current S construction measures equilibrium distance.
replacement: S is an equilibrium-distance coordinate only where code, configuration, and equation use a concordant residual construction.

forbidden_headline: H and S are independent homeostatic axes.
replacement: The Tier 1 composite is exploratory until redundancy and noise-matched effective dimensionality are audited.

forbidden_headline: Black holes universally converge toward one homeostatic state as mass increases.
replacement: In the frozen TNG Tier 1 branch, residence-based ripeness has a negative dispersion slope under the declared estimators, subject to provenance, effective-unit, and construction-null caps.

forbidden_headline: Median potential provides a robust compression law.
replacement: The ordinary-variance median-potential trend is tail dominated and fails robust re-estimation.

forbidden_headline: GAMA establishes a universal observational black-hole compression law.
replacement: The GAMA D4000-offset branch is a directional, three-bin, resolution-limited observational analogue.

forbidden_headline: The quarantined sigma-star slope is confirmatory evidence.
replacement: The GAMA sigma-star construction is numerically quarantined pending clean reconstruction and target-side independence checks.

forbidden_headline: MaNGA confirms universal black-hole homeostatic compression.
replacement: MaNGA demonstrates survey-scale portability but refuses a universal compression law.

forbidden_headline: The score measures intrinsic black-hole maturity.
replacement: The score is an exploratory contextual ranking whose component and rank stability can be audited.

forbidden_headline: Settlement residuals alone prove violent disturbance.
replacement: Extreme settlement outliers are candidates for independent merger and host-disturbance validation.

forbidden_headline: Residence fraction is itself proof of dynamical memory.
replacement: Memory remains unactivated until a frozen generator ladder survives admitted finite augmentations and time-order nulls.

forbidden_headline: Post-event return time is automatically a predictive recoverability coordinate.
replacement: Recoverability remains unactivated until an information-time-valid R predicts an independent later recovery event.

forbidden_headline: All four HRSM coordinates are empirically active in black holes.
replacement: The current evidence supports at most a reduced Tier 1 projection while R and M remain future tests.
